name: PayHive
description: Mobile money aggregator enabling merchants to accept MoMo, Telecel Cash, and AT Money through a single QR or USSD shortcode.
reason: Founder relocating. Profitable, low churn.

name: LogiRun
description: Last-mile delivery coordination platform connecting SMEs in Accra to vetted dispatch riders with real-time tracking via WhatsApp.
reason: Pivoting to B2B SaaS model. Core logistics IP for sale.

name: SchoolPulse
description: School management SaaS for private basic schools — fee collection, attendance, and parent communication in one dashboard.
reason: Co-founders splitting. 68 paying schools. Strong retention.

name: AgroLink GH
description: Marketplace connecting smallholder farmers in the Brong-Ahafo region directly to buyers in Accra, cutting out middlemen.
reason: Founder won international fellowship. Transferring project.

name: RentEase
description: Digital rent payment and landlord-tenant management platform with mobile money integration and automated rent reminders.
reason: Seeking strategic acquirer with property network.

name: MediFlow
description: Pharmacy inventory and patient prescription management system built for community pharmacies across Accra and Tema.
reason: Founder pursuing masters abroad. Profitable unit economics.

name: TalentPool GH
description: Vetted freelancer marketplace for Ghana's creative and tech economy — designers, developers, and digital marketers.
reason: Consolidation opportunity. Strong SEO and brand.

name: CashTrack
description: Personal finance app for Ghanaian millennials — track MoMo, bank, and cash transactions with auto-categorization and budget alerts.
reason: Solo founder burnout. 6k active users, strong reviews.

name: EventBase
description: Event ticketing and RSVP platform built for Ghana's events economy — concerts, conferences, and private events with MoMo checkout.
reason: Team pursuing new venture. 2 years of strong event seasons.

name: WasteConnect
description: On-demand waste pickup scheduling app connecting households in Accra to licensed waste collectors.
reason: Grant funding ended. Solid user base for acquirer with ops capacity.

name: BuildPro GH
description: Construction project management tool for Ghanaian contractors — budgets, material tracking, and client reporting.
reason: Founder joining family construction firm. Cannot run both.

name: NutriGH
description: Diet and nutrition tracking app localized for Ghanaian foods — jollof, kenkey, fufu — with Twi language support.
reason: Founder returning to clinical work. Strong app with no monetization yet.

name: LegalEase GH
description: Document automation tool for SMEs — NDAs, service agreements, and employment contracts compliant with Ghana law.
reason: Lead attorney going into private practice. Transferring IP and clients.

name: SolarTrack
description: IoT monitoring dashboard for solar installations in Ghana — real-time output, battery health, and fault alerts.
reason: Seeking hardware partner or energy company acquirer.

name: ChopDirect
description: Direct-to-consumer meal subscription service for office workers in Accra — local caterers, set menus, daily delivery.
reason: Partnership breakdown. Strong revenue, established caterer network.

name: TutorHub
description: Online tutoring marketplace connecting WAEC/BECE students with verified tutors across Ghana.
reason: Founder emigrating. 4,200 registered students.

name: SafeRemit
description: Diaspora remittance tool enabling Ghanaians abroad to send money directly to MoMo wallets with competitive FX rates.
reason: Regulatory compliance burden. Seeking licensed financial acquirer.

name: MarketPadi
description: Social commerce platform for market traders in Kumasi and Accra — catalogue sharing via WhatsApp with order tracking.
reason: Infrastructure costs exceeding revenue. Product-market fit proven.

name: HRNest
description: HR and payroll automation platform for Ghanaian SMEs — SSNIT contributions, PAYE, and staff records management.
reason: Strategic sale. Profitable with strong B2B contracts.

name: GreenHaul
description: EV cargo tricycle rental platform for market traders doing short-distance freight in Accra markets.
reason: Hardware prototype complete. Seeking operational partner to launch.
